dialog.title: New Project
dialog.description: Describe your project and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

about.title: About me
about.description1: For approximately the past 10 years, I have been engaged in teaching mathematics and physics. As a recent graduate of the School of Applied Mathematical and Physical Sciences at the National Technical University of Athens, with a specialization in mathematical informatics and statistics, I aspire to become a member of the tech community and contribute to the development of modern technologies and systems aimed at solving real-world, large-scale problems.
about.description2: The interview process was pleasant and straightforward. From the very beginning, the role, responsibilities, compensation, and company goals were made clear to me.

projectOne.title: Digital Portfolio
projectOne.subtitle: nasia-adam.com
projectOne.description: A personal space designed to tell a story. This portfolio brings creative work to life, ensuring every detail reflects the unique identity behind it.

projectTwo.title: Brand Landing Page
projectTwo.subtitle: dotheworkintensive.com
projectTwo.description: A bold landing page built for action. We focused on clear paths and high energy, helping people connect with the mission while feeling the drive of the brand.

projectThree.title: E-Commerce
projectThree.subtitle: stolesergasias.gr
projectThree.description: A shopping experience that feels intuitive. This e-shop balances complex logic with a clean interface, making every purchase feel simple and secure.
